_comment: Easiest way to edit this is the app's Settings (gear icon, top right) — toggle agents on/off, choose the synthesizer, and set each model + effort. You can also edit here directly. Each model's command is built as: bin + baseArgs + (modelFlag + model, if model is set) + (effortArgs, if effort is set) + promptArgs. {{PROMPT}} = your question; {{EFFORT}} = the effort value.
panelInstruction: You are one member of an advisory panel answering a user's question. Give your single best, direct answer. Be accurate, specific, and reasonably concise. Do not ask follow-up questions, do not use any tools, and do not read or modify any files — just answer the question in plain markdown.
